info.title: Infotravel API
info.description: This is the manual for you to integrate your company to the Infotravel Platform.

tags.name: Getting Start
tags.description:
Welcome developer!


Solicitando as credenciais

As credenciais para acessar a API da plataforma Infotravel devem ser geradas pelo cliente da Infotera no qual deseja consumir os serviÃ§os.
Credenciais de acesso: `username`, `password`, `client` and `agency`
Endpoint: http://api.infotravel.com.br/api/v1

Obtendo o Token JWT

Primeriamente para que voce tenha acessa ao servicos da API Infotravel, Ã© necessario realizar uma requisiÃ§Ã£o HTTP com o metodo POST para url de autenticaÃ§Ã£o informando credenciais obtidas pelo cliente Infotera.
Assim que a aplicaÃ§Ã£o recebe essa requisiÃ§Ã£o realiza o processo de autenticaÃ§Ã£o que consiste em verificar se os dados foram informados corretamente.
Caso as credenciais informadas no corpo da requisiÃ§Ã£o estejam corretas a aplicaÃ§Ã£o retorna um token JWT.

Abaixo temos um exemplo da requisiÃ§Ã£o: 

curl -X POST http://api.infotravel.com.br/api/v1/authenticate -H "Content-type:application/json" -d "{"username":"test","password":"xr%34d", "client": "XPTO", "agency": "0"}"

Resposta: 

{"accessToken":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJtYXN0ZXIiLCJleHAiOjE2MzUyNzI3NzMsImlhdCI6MTYzNTI3MjE3M30.ELR0XvAxIsPaumDp4AYo8Z93Wimk9BhW4cBIVo9JrgoKZs553VwGdk1DgxqKZG0lDyzIzMe3B_vJ9AIH1ewgTw","type":"Bearer","expire_seconds":599}"

Veja que no corpo da resposta HTTP temos um JSON que possui o token que serÃ¡ utilizado em todas as chamadas da api

Usando o Token JWT

O token deverÃ¡ ser enviado a partir do header Authorization em todas as requisiÃ§Ãµes realizadas de nossa API.

get.description: This method is used to request room rebooking availability

parameters.name: occupancy
parameters.description:
Each room must have at least 1 adult occupant.
Format: numberOfAdults[-firstChildAge[,nextChildAge]].
2 adults + one 9-year-old + one 4-year-old would be represented by occupancy=2-9,4
A multi-room: 2 adults would be represented by occupancy=2-9,4&occupancy=2

get.description: This method is used to request experience availability
This method is used to request insurance availability
This method is used to request service package availability
This method is used to request activity availability
This method is used to request service transfers availability
This method is used to request room availability

parameters.name: occupancy
parameters.description:
Each room must have at least 1 adult occupant.
Format: numberOfAdults[-firstChildAge[,nextChildAge]].
2 adults + one 9-year-old + one 4-year-old would be represented by occupancy=2-9,4
A multi-room: 2 adults would be represented by occupancy=2-9,4&occupancy=2

parameters.name: keyDetail

parameters.description: If true, the billing process for supplies will not be executed; this is used for additional hotel services, for example

parameters.name: occupancy

Each room must have at least 1 adult occupant.

2 adults + one 9-year-old + one 4-year-old would be represented by occupancy=2-9,4

get.description: This method is used to request service ticket availability

parameters.name: isNotDetailed
parameters.description: When true, skips detail calls for faster response without modalities

parameters.name: keyDetail
parameters.description: Base64 encoded key for specific ticket detail. Format: cdServico#idIntegrador

get.description: This method is used to request chip availability
This method is used to request vehicle availability

Search for available circuits based on destination, date, occupancy, and other filters.
This is the first step to check which circuits are available for booking.

**Flow:** First, call `/circuit` to check availability, then `/circuit/calendar` to view monthly tariffs, and finally `/circuit/daily-details` to get detailed pricing for a specific day.

parameters.name: searchType
parameters.description: Type of search: 'R' for Regions or 'C' for Code.

parameters.name: searchCode
parameters.description: Code or name used for the search based on the selected search type.

parameters.name: allDestiny
parameters.description: If true, searches for tours that include at least one of the selected destinations.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Desired departure date for the circuit search (format: yyyy-MM-dd).

parameters.name: occupancy
parameters.description: Occupancy details (e.g., number of adults, children, ages).

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the client making the request.

post.description: Retrieve the monthly tariff calendar for a selected circuit. Use this after checking availability to view prices across different dates within a month.

requestBody.description: Booking request object containing circuit details, including selected circuit and date (month/year).

get.description: This method is used to request bus availability

post.description: Retrieve detailed tariff information for a specific day of a selected circuit. This is used after viewing the calendar to get precise pricing and conditions for booking on a chosen date.

requestBody.description: Booking request object with circuit information to retrieve detailed daily pricing and conditions.

get.description: Returns all B2C configurations

post.summary: Update B2C Config by domain URL
post.description: Overwrites the B2C configuration JSON for the given domain. Only users listed in the config's adminUsers array may call this endpoint.

get.summary: Get B2C Config by domain URL
get.description: Returns the B2C configuration JSON for a given domain URL (ds_url_b2c)

delete.description: BookingCancellation is used either to simulate a cancellation or to perform the actual cancellation.

parameters.description:
Bearer AuthString
AuthString is the access token obtained from the authentication endpoint

parameters.name: cancelType
parameters.description:
Default: SIMULATION
Enum: SIMULATION,CANCELLATION
Type of cancellation method to be used.

parameters.name: waitForProcessing
parameters.description: When set to true, the API call will wait for the booking process to complete before returning a response. If false or not provided, the request returns immediately with a processing status, and the final result must be retrieved asynchronously.
